dataset_name: Health App TR Common Foods Nutrition Dataset
unit_basis: Values are per 100 g edible portion unless basis says otherwise. Serving values are derived by grams/100. Null nutrient values mean unknown, not zero.

sources.license_note: USDA FoodData Central public/open U.S. government food composition data; verify attribution requirements before release.

sources.note: Supplementary source for common foods not present in FDC Foundation, e.g. tea/coffee/honey/cooked staples.
sources.license_note: UK CoFID / McCance and Widdowson dataset; verify Open Government Licence attribution before release.
